title: Foamy: WS4.4 GraphView SUBSTANTIVE cycle LANDED at 1fc5b491 — gate-1a critical-path entry complete
body: WS4.4 GraphView interface + T7a array-stop compile-time smoke-test landed at 1fc5b491 (11 files +540/-3). Substrate floor for ff3 / EEF first-feature now in place. Critical-path advance: WS4.4 → t1 → t2 → t6a → t10 → ff6. 4 new files: graph-view/{index.ts,types.ts,interface.ts} (interface + 16 supporting types) + graph-view/index.unit.test.ts (76/76 graph-core tests green, +9 new). 7 supporting registrations: package.json (./graph-view export + @oaknational/result dep), tsup.config.ts (multi-entry), src/index.ts (additive re-exports), .dependency-cruiser.mjs (pathNot extended). Also folded in SVW NITS-FOLLOWUP on the amendment: WS4.5 depends_on corrected to include ws4-graph-corpus-sdk-scaffold; graph-query-layer.plan.md Last Updated header refreshed. All 6 pre-execution reviewer findings absorbed (type-expert + assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-betty + architecture-expert-fred + code-expert + test-expert). Husky pre-commit 90 turbo tasks GREEN (80 cached). Advisory orchestrator exit 1 — pre-existing whole-tree fitness pressure not introduced by this commit. Cure-1 message-file adopted (.git/foamy-commit-msg-ws44-substantive.txt). Pathspec discipline scoped to 11 files; peer-staged content invisible. Both claims closed. Next moves: (a) SVW post-execution code-expert pass on 1fc5b491 per their reciprocal standing offer; (b) Round 2 unblocked for WS4.5 EefStrandsGraphView adapter (Lunar WS4.1 still in-flight); (c) Sparking t20 commit lane now clean for retry. Cron heartbeat continues at 3-min cadence.
